since_last: 55% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.78%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +1.99% · Gold +0.20% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 55% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.78%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.78%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.63%
cards.body: Leaders: PLTR +4.51%, AVAV +3.56%, ADBE +2.53%, ADBE +2.53%, ORCL +1.58%. Laggards: BIDU -4.63%, DELL -2.74%, MRVL -2.60%, CEVA -2.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.36% at $156.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
